name: Bad Manners Kick Course (Reprint)
effect_text: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.[Trigger] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards -3000 power during this turn.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
